selected_for_build.name: Cold Email Writer
selected_for_build.icp: sales team member sending cold emails to potential customers
selected_for_build.pain_point: Struggling to craft effective cold emails that get responses
selected_for_build.core_feature: AI-powered email writing assistance for cold outreach
selected_for_build.founder_story: I've spent countless hours writing cold emails that fell flat, and I wished I had a tool to help me craft emails that actually got responses. As a founder, I understand the pain of trying to scale cold outreach efforts without a reliable email writing solution.
selected_for_build.viral_attribution: Generated by Cold Email Writer — cold-email-writer-tool.vercel.app

selected_for_build.name: Subject Line Pro
selected_for_build.pain_point: Struggling to write effective email subject lines that increase open rates
selected_for_build.founder_story: As a marketer, I've spent hours trying to come up with the perfect subject line, only to see my emails go unopened. I wished there was a tool that could help me write subject lines that actually work.
selected_for_build.viral_attribution: Generated by Email Subject Writer — email-subject-writer.vercel.app

selected_for_build.name: Apology Email Pro
selected_for_build.icp: customer support specialist responding to complaints
selected_for_build.pain_point: Struggling to craft sincere and effective apology emails to customers
selected_for_build.founder_story: I've been in situations where I had to apologize to customers via email and struggled to find the right words, which is why I created this tool to help others like me. I believe a well-crafted apology email can make all the difference in resolving issues and maintaining customer trust
selected_for_build.viral_attribution: Generated by Apology Email Pro — apology-email-writer.vercel.app

all_specs.name: Resume Refiner
all_specs.icp: entry-level job seeker struggling to get interviews
all_specs.pain_point: Applicants are often rejected due to poorly formatted or ineffective resumes.
all_specs.founder_story: As a recent graduate, I struggled to get my foot in the door due to a lackluster resume. I wish I had a tool to help me refine my resume and increase my chances of getting hired.
